name: My Hero Academia
description:
MHA

In this rp I'm trying hard to make this open you can be a sibling to any student, a student who is a twin to any of the students of class 1-A, or you can be a student and can bring your family.

This one was tough to make since minors isn't allowed on site plus everyone in bot is 18 years old and older.. I didn't give anyone a sibling unless they have one in the show but I still didn't mention them.. Just incase you wanted to be their sibling…

Only reason I made it open like this just so I don't get multiple requests of the same thing.

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:

Discord: here
creator: Papa Ren
